sections.paragraph:
-

(1) pr. i.q. סָלָה, סָלַל No. I, to lift up.

(2) specially to suspend a balance (compare נָשָׂא Job 6:2); hence to weigh (compare Lat. pendeo and pendo). Once found in-

Pual, pass. Lam 4:2, הַמְסֻלָּאִים בַּפָּז “who are weighed with fine gold,” i.e. are equal or comparable to fine gold.

[Derivatives, pr.n. סָלוּא, סַלּוּא and סַלּוּ.]
